headline: Iran's radicalized regime fuels threat of nuclear bomb
description: Donald Trump seems to be considering ending the war with Tehran without addressing the nuclear issue. Yet the conflict has only made Iran's nuclear program more opaque and fueled the determination of its new leaders to acquire nuclear weapons.

headline: US fighter jet shot down in Iran
In the Democratic Republic of Congo, a US company secures a 'huge' deal by acquiring copper and cobalt mines
Venezuela and the US normalize relations three months after the abduction of Nicolas Maduro
description: Washington has lifted sanctions against interim president Delcy Rodriguez. As the country undergoes a transition, the opposition is struggling to make its voice heard.

headline: 'Donald Trump unwittingly, but significantly, advances the energy transition'
description: In the wake of the global oil and gas shock triggered by the American strike on Iran, the president of the United States has turned into something of a climate doctor, accelerating the shift of major economies toward decarbonized energy, writes economist Patrice Geoffron in this op-ed for Le Monde.

headline: Dinosaur egg trove discovered in Hérault
description: The Musée des dinosaures de Mèze has announced the discovery of about 100 dinosaur eggs dating back approximately 72 million years, making this deposit one of the most significant in the world.

headline: Five Paris design exhibitions not to miss this spring
description: From Elizabeth Garouste's floral furniture to Gaetano Pesce's office pieces and Jean-Michel Wilmotte's sculptural works, this is Le Monde's selection of the French capital's must-see events this season.

'Refusing to divide French society into the racialized and the non-racialized does not mean denying the existence of racism'
description: Sociologist Stéphane Beaud and historian Gérard Noiriel analyze why people who have experienced racism – such as Bally Bagayoko, Saint-Denis's new mayor – may reject the label 'racialized.'

headline: Unraveling 18th-century fashion at the Palais Galliera
description: The Paris museum is exhibiting period dresses and the contemporary garments they inspired, revealing the versatility of a style that has been mythologized ever since the second half of the 19th century.

headline: French archives of Spaniards who fled Franco's dictatorship are now available online
description: From March 30, over 180,000 records are accessible on the French Office for the Protection of Refugees and Stateless Persons' website, due to funding from Spain aimed at preserving the memory of people's 40 years of exile in France.

headline: The EU must respond to the challenges posed by Viktor Orban
